payload.title: Convert a small external crate via the wrapper
payload.description: After RT-5 (multi-module): pick a real external crate (~500-1500 LOC, MIT/Apache), vendor it into case-studies/, add rustricted_attrs::strict!{} per file, build via RUSTC_WRAPPER, fix violations honestly, write up the experience. Different signal from internal dogfood (different idioms, different bug surface).
